# SNAP real-world fixture

`SnapBufferReadYAML.gml` is copied verbatim from SNAP commit
`b4191e195c7c84359f995d568d8906c452b83e50` and is retained as an extraction
regression fixture. Its SHA-256 digest is
`fce899ed47c473d8e378a79c439f46da2019e05871109918889fe849c65860d6`.
